metadata.description: A curated list of awesome Claude Skills for productivity across Claude.ai, Claude Code, and the Claude API.

plugins.name: artifacts-builder
plugins.description: Suite of tools for creating elaborate, multi-component Claude.ai HTML artifacts using React, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui.

plugins.name: brand-guidelines
plugins.description: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography to artifacts for consistent visual identity.

plugins.name: canvas-design
plugins.description: Creates beautiful visual art in PNG and PDF documents using design philosophy and aesthetic principles.

plugins.name: changelog-generator
plugins.description: Automatically creates user-facing changelogs from git commits by analyzing history and transforming technical commits into customer-friendly release notes.

plugins.name: competitive-ads-extractor
plugins.description: Extracts and analyzes competitors' ads from ad libraries to understand messaging and creative approaches.

plugins.name: content-research-writer
plugins.description: Assists in writing high-quality content by conducting research, adding citations, improving hooks, and providing feedback.

plugins.name: domain-name-brainstormer
plugins.description: Generates creative domain name ideas and checks availability across multiple TLDs.

plugins.name: file-organizer
plugins.description: Intelligently organizes files and folders by understanding context, finding duplicates, and suggesting better structures.

plugins.name: image-enhancer
plugins.description: Improves image and screenshot quality by enhancing resolution, sharpness, and clarity.

plugins.name: internal-comms
plugins.description: Helps write internal communications including 3P updates, newsletters, FAQs, status reports, and project updates.

plugins.name: invoice-organizer
plugins.description: Automatically organizes invoices and receipts for tax preparation by reading files, extracting information, and renaming consistently.

plugins.name: lead-research-assistant
plugins.description: Identifies and qualifies high-quality leads by analyzing your product, searching for target companies, and providing outreach strategies.

plugins.name: mcp-builder
plugins.description: Guides creation of high-quality MCP servers for integrating external APIs and services with LLMs.

plugins.name: meeting-insights-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyzes meeting transcripts to uncover behavioral patterns including conflict avoidance, speaking ratios, and leadership style.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Provides guidance for creating effective Claude Skills that extend capabilities with specialized knowledge and workflows.

plugins.name: tailored-resume-generator
plugins.description: Analyzes job descriptions and generates tailored resumes that highlight relevant experience and skills.

plugins.name: theme-factory
plugins.description: Applies professional font and color themes to artifacts including slides, docs, reports, and HTML pages with 10 pre-set themes.

plugins.name: twitter-algorithm-optimizer
plugins.description: Analyze and optimize tweets for maximum reach using Twitter's open-source algorithm insights.

plugins.name: webapp-testing
plugins.description: Tests local web applications using Playwright for verifying frontend functionality and capturing screenshots.
